name: Fried Mexican Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 1 pint Vanilla ice cream OR other flavor
1/2 cup Crushed cornflakes or cookie crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop out 4 to 5 balls of ice cream and return them to the freezer.
2. Mix the cornflake crumbs, cinnamon, and sugar in a shallow dish.
3. Roll each frozen ice cream ball in half of the crumb mixture and place back in the freezer.
4. Beat the egg and dip each coated ball in the egg, then roll again in the remaining crumbs.
5. Place the balls back in the freezer until ready to serve.
6. For a thicker coating, repeat dipping in egg and rolling in crumbs.
7. Heat oil in a deep fryer or saucepan to 350°F (175°C).
8. Carefully lower one frozen ice cream ball into the hot oil for about 1 minute.
9. Remove the ball from the oil using tongs and place it on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
10. Transfer the fried ice cream balls to a dessert dish. Drizzle with honey.
11. Top each serving with a dollop of whipped cream.
12. Continue frying the remaining balls one at a time. Serve immediately.
Makes 4 to 5 servings
